title: how-to-create-grunt-demo
text: How to create grunt demo step by step1$ grunt -version grunt-cli v1.2.0 Step 1 install grunt, grunt-cli, grunt-init123$ npm install -g grunt$ npm install -g grunt-cli$ npm install -g grunt-init Step 2 install template for grunt-init, example as jquery12$ cd USERNAME\.grunt-init$ git clone https://github.com/gruntjs/grunt-init-jquery.git jquery or if not windows, please just use1git clone https://github.com/gruntjs/grunt-init-jquery.git ~/.grunt-init/jquery Step 3 usage1$ grunt-init jquery Step 4 run test1$ grunt qunit Running “qunit:files” (qunit) taskTesting test/test.html ….OK 5 assertions passed (58ms) Reference to offical websiteGetting Started

title: NewHexoBlog
text: Create Hexo Blog step by stepStep 1 install git,nodejsGitNodeJS Step 2 install hexo12$ npm install -g hexo$ npm install Step 3 create folder and initilize123$ cd d:\GitHub$ mkdir hexo-blog$ hexo init Step 4 generate html pages1$ hexo generate (hexo g) Step 5 testing in local1$ hexo server (hexo s) Step 6 deploy into github1$ npm install hexo-deployer-git --save modify _config.yml, go to the end and add following lines:1234deploy: type: git repo: https://github.com/nateliu/nateliu.github.io.git branch: master Step 7 launch with following lines123$ hexo clean$ hexo generate$ hexo deploy Step 8 go to chrome to see the result.My Hexo Blog: My-Hexo-Blog Step 9 my source for hexo-bloghexo-blog

title: Hello World
text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment http://www.jianshu.com/p/465830080ea9 http://www.cnblogs.com/zhcncn/p/4097881.html view-source:http://kresnik.wang/works/tech/2016/06/07/%E5%9C%A8github%20pages%E7%BD%91%E7%AB%99%E4%B8%8B%E7%94%A8jekyll%E5%88%B6%E4%BD%9C%E5%8D%9A%E5%AE%A2%E6%95%99%E7%A8%8B.html
